name: narrativeos-agent
description: Run the NarrativeOS local 500-chapter novel-writing agent from Codex without connecting to the hosted platform database.

interface.shortDescription: Generate, validate, preview, and export longform .nosbook novels locally.
interface.longDescription: NarrativeOS Agent is a local-first creator plugin for drafting up to 500 chapters with Codex, checkpointing local progress, validating the .nosbook publishing contract, previewing chapters, and exporting marketplace-ready bundles with cover assets and rights metadata.
defaultPrompt: 用 NarrativeOS Agent 在本地生成一本 500 章小说
校验 longform_500 并导出 .nosbook 作品包
预览我的本地小说章节
